_comment: The Merchant's Guild — Magic Item Catalog (2024 DMG expanded). Organized by rarity with dual descriptions, tier requirements, store type tags, and attunement flags.

items.name: Potion of Healing
items.descriptionDM: A creature that drinks this potion regains 2d4+2 hit points.
items.descriptionPlayer: A small vial of shimmering red liquid that sloshes gently

items.name: Potion of Climbing
items.descriptionDM: When you drink this potion, you gain a climbing speed equal to your walking speed for 1 hour.
items.descriptionPlayer: A curious potion with three distinct layered colors that refuse to mix

items.name: Potion of Poison
items.descriptionDM: This concoction looks, smells, and tastes like a Potion of Healing. However, it is actually poison masked by illusion magic. Drinking it deals 3d6 poison damage and the drinker is poisoned.
items.descriptionPlayer: A vial of red liquid, identical in appearance to a healing potion

items.name: Spell Scroll (Fire Bolt)
items.descriptionDM: A spell scroll bearing the Fire Bolt cantrip.
items.descriptionPlayer: A rolled parchment sealed with a faintly warm wax stamp

items.name: Spell Scroll (Light)
items.descriptionDM: A spell scroll bearing the Light cantrip.
items.descriptionPlayer: A rolled parchment that seems to glow faintly at the edges

items.name: Spell Scroll (Mending)
items.descriptionDM: A spell scroll bearing the Mending cantrip.
items.descriptionPlayer: A rolled parchment with tiny stitching patterns in the wax seal

items.name: Spell Scroll (1st Level)
items.descriptionDM: A spell scroll bearing a random 1st-level spell.
items.descriptionPlayer: A scroll of fine parchment with faintly glowing ink

items.name: Driftglobe
items.descriptionDM: This small sphere of thick glass can emanate the Light or Daylight spell when its command word is spoken. The Daylight effect can be used once per day.
items.descriptionPlayer: A heavy glass sphere, perfectly smooth, with a faint cloudiness swirling inside

items.name: Cloak of Billowing
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this cloak, you can use a bonus action to make it billow dramatically. No other mechanical benefit.
items.descriptionPlayer: A fine cloak that seems to ripple and flow even in still air

items.name: Moon-Touched Longsword
items.descriptionDM: In darkness, the unsheathed blade sheds moonlight, creating bright light in a 15-foot radius and dim light for an additional 15 feet. It is a magic weapon.
items.descriptionPlayer: A longsword with a pale, almost silvery blade that seems to catch light that isn't there

items.name: Moon-Touched Shortsword
items.descriptionDM: In darkness, the unsheathed blade sheds moonlight, creating bright light in a 15-foot radius and dim light for an additional 15 feet. It is a magic weapon.
items.descriptionPlayer: A short blade of silvery metal that glimmers faintly in shadow

items.name: Hat of Disguise
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this hat, you can use an action to cast the Disguise Self spell from it at will. The spell ends if the hat is removed.
items.descriptionPlayer: An unremarkable felt hat that never quite looks the same way twice

items.name: Ruby of the War Mage
items.descriptionDM: This ruby can be attached to a weapon, which can then be used as a spellcasting focus.
items.descriptionPlayer: A deep red gemstone, perfectly round, warm to the touch

items.name: Clockwork Amulet
items.descriptionDM: This copper amulet contains tiny interlocking gears. Once per day when you make an attack roll, you can forgo rolling the d20 to get a 10 on the die.
items.descriptionPlayer: A copper pendant with tiny moving parts visible through a glass face, softly ticking

items.name: Ear Horn of Hearing
items.descriptionDM: While held up to your ear, this horn suppresses the effects of the Deafened condition on you.
items.descriptionPlayer: A small brass horn, ornately shaped, clearly meant to be held near the head

items.name: Staff of Flowers
items.descriptionDM: This staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cause a flower to sprout from soil within 5 feet. The staff regains 1d6+4 charges daily at dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A gnarled wooden staff with small buds along its length that never quite bloom

items.name: Tankard of Sobriety
items.descriptionDM: You can drink ale, wine, or any other nonmagical alcoholic beverage poured into this tankard without becoming inebriated.
items.descriptionPlayer: A sturdy pewter tankard with a faintly glowing rune on the bottom

items.name: Wand of Pyrotechnics
items.descriptionDM: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to create a harmless burst of multicolored light at a point within 60 feet. Regains 1d6+1 charges daily at dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A slender wand tipped with a charred, blackened end that smells faintly of sulfur

items.name: Pole of Collapsing
items.descriptionDM: This 10-foot pole can be collapsed to 1 foot with a command word, and extended again with another.
items.descriptionPlayer: An unusually short metal rod with barely visible seams along its length

items.name: Cloak of Many Fashions
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this cloak, you can use a bonus action to change its style, color, and apparent quality. The cloak's weight remains unchanged.
items.descriptionPlayer: A cloak that seems to change color slightly depending on how the light hits it

items.name: Potion of Greater Healing
items.descriptionDM: A creature that drinks this potion regains 4d4+4 hit points.
items.descriptionPlayer: A larger vial of deep crimson liquid that pulses with a faint inner light

items.name: Potion of Fire Breath
items.descriptionDM: After drinking this potion, you can exhale fire at a target within 30 feet three times within 1 hour, dealing 4d6 fire damage (DC 13 Dex save).
items.descriptionPlayer: A bubbling orange liquid that radiates warmth even through the glass vial

items.name: Potion of Growth
items.descriptionDM: When you drink this potion, you gain the enlarge effect of the Enlarge/Reduce spell for 1d4 hours (no concentration required).
items.descriptionPlayer: A thick green potion that seems to push against the cork from inside the bottle

items.name: Potion of Animal Friendship
items.descriptionDM: When you drink this potion, you can cast Animal Friendship (DC 13) at will for 1 hour.
items.descriptionPlayer: A murky potion with bits of fur and feather floating inside

items.name: Potion of Water Breathing
items.descriptionDM: You can breathe underwater for 1 hour after drinking this potion.
items.descriptionPlayer: A blue-green potion that seems to swirl on its own, like a tiny ocean in a bottle

items.name: Potion of Resistance
items.descriptionDM: When you drink this potion, you gain resistance to one type of damage for 1 hour. The type depends on the potion's color.
items.descriptionPlayer: A potion of unusual color that seems to shift between two hues

items.name: Potion of Heroism
items.descriptionDM: For 1 hour after drinking this potion, you gain 10 temporary hit points and are under the effects of the Bless spell (no concentration required).
items.descriptionPlayer: A sparkling golden liquid that seems to glow with inner courage

items.name: Spell Scroll (2nd Level)
items.descriptionDM: A spell scroll bearing a random 2nd-level spell.
items.descriptionPlayer: A scroll sealed with wax and inscribed with dense, glowing script

items.name: Spell Scroll (3rd Level)
items.descriptionDM: A spell scroll bearing a random 3rd-level spell.
items.descriptionPlayer: A scroll of heavy parchment sealed with an intricate silver clasp

items.name: +1 Longsword
items.descriptionDM: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
items.descriptionPlayer: A finely crafted longsword with an unusually keen edge that never seems to dull

items.name: +1 Shortsword
items.descriptionDM: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
items.descriptionPlayer: A short blade of exceptional balance with a faint hum when drawn

items.name: +1 Battleaxe
items.descriptionDM: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
items.descriptionPlayer: A heavy axe with a gleaming edge that seems sharper than any whetstone could produce

items.name: +1 Longbow
items.descriptionDM: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
items.descriptionPlayer: An elegant bow of unusual wood that practically draws itself

items.name: +1 Dagger
items.descriptionDM: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
items.descriptionPlayer: A dagger with an impossibly thin blade that catches light oddly

items.name: +1 Warhammer
items.descriptionDM: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
items.descriptionPlayer: A warhammer with runes etched along the haft that warm to the touch

items.name: Javelin of Lightning
items.descriptionDM: When you hurl this javelin and speak its command word, it transforms into a bolt of lightning. Make a ranged weapon attack, then each creature in a 5-foot-wide line between you and the target must make a DC 13 Dex save or take 4d6 lightning damage. The javelin then returns to its spear form. This property can be used only once per dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A javelin with a head forged from a strange bluish metal that crackles faintly when touched

items.name: Trident of Fish Command
items.descriptionDM: This trident is a magic weapon. It has 3 charges and regains 1d3 charges daily at dawn. While carrying it, you can expend a charge to cast Dominate Beast (save DC 15) on a beast with a swimming speed.
items.descriptionPlayer: A trident of blue-green metal with coral growths along the haft

items.name: Weapon of Warning (Longsword)
items.descriptionDM: This magic weapon warns you of danger. While it is on your person, you have advantage on initiative rolls. In addition, you and any of your companions within 30 feet can't be surprised.
items.descriptionPlayer: A longsword that vibrates faintly, as if always alert to something you can't perceive

items.name: +1 Shield
items.descriptionDM: While holding this shield, you have a +1 bonus to AC in addition to the shield's normal AC bonus.
items.descriptionPlayer: A sturdy shield with a faint metallic sheen that doesn't match the material it's made of

items.name: +1 Leather Armor
items.descriptionDM: You have a +1 bonus to AC while wearing this armor.
items.descriptionPlayer: Supple leather armor that seems to mold itself to the wearer's body

items.name: +1 Chain Shirt
items.descriptionDM: You have a +1 bonus to AC while wearing this armor.
items.descriptionPlayer: A chain shirt of unusually fine links that barely makes a sound when moved

items.name: Adamantine Chain Mail
items.descriptionDM: This suit of armor is reinforced with adamantine. While wearing it, any critical hit against you becomes a normal hit.
items.descriptionPlayer: A suit of chain mail made from dark, dense metal rings that seem impossibly heavy for their size

items.name: Mithral Chain Shirt
items.descriptionDM: This armor is made of mithral. It can be worn under normal clothes and doesn't impose disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.
items.descriptionPlayer: An incredibly light chain shirt of silvery metal that makes almost no sound

items.name: Mithral Breastplate
items.descriptionDM: This armor is made of mithral and can be worn under normal clothes. It doesn't impose disadvantage on Stealth checks.
items.descriptionPlayer: A breastplate of silver-white metal, lighter than it has any right to be

items.name: Bag of Holding
items.descriptionDM: This bag has an interior space considerably larger than its outside dimensions. The bag can hold up to 500 pounds, not exceeding 64 cubic feet. Weighs 15 pounds regardless of contents.
items.descriptionPlayer: A simple cloth bag that feels oddly light and seems deeper than it should be when you reach inside

items.name: Cloak of Protection
items.descriptionDM: You gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws while you wear this cloak.
items.descriptionPlayer: A finely woven cloak with a subtle shimmer to the fabric, heavier than it looks

items.name: Goggles of Night
items.descriptionDM: While wearing these dark lenses, you have darkvision out to 60 feet. If you already have darkvision, the range increases by 60 feet.
items.descriptionPlayer: A pair of tinted lenses set in a leather frame, the glass almost black

items.name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
items.descriptionDM: Your Strength score is 19 while you wear these gauntlets. No effect if your Strength is already 19 or higher.
items.descriptionPlayer: Oversized iron gauntlets etched with crude runes, surprisingly warm to the touch

items.name: Immovable Rod
items.descriptionDM: This flat iron rod has a button on one end. You can press the button to fix the rod magically in place. It can hold up to 8,000 pounds.
items.descriptionPlayer: A plain iron rod with a single button on one end, unremarkable except for its perfect balance

items.name: Pearl of Power
items.descriptionDM: While on your person, you can use an action to regain one expended spell slot of 3rd level or lower. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: An iridescent pearl, warm and smooth, that seems to hum faintly when held

items.name: Winged Boots
items.descriptionDM: While wearing these boots, you have a flying speed equal to your walking speed. You can use the boots for up to 4 hours, recharging after 12 hours.
items.descriptionPlayer: Elegant leather boots with small decorative wings at the ankles that occasionally twitch

items.name: Broom of Flying
items.descriptionDM: This wooden broom hovers when you stand astride it and speak its command word. Flying speed 50 feet, carrying up to 200 pounds or 400 pounds at 30 feet.
items.descriptionPlayer: A well-made wooden broom that feels strangely buoyant when held

items.name: Alchemy Jug
items.descriptionDM: This ceramic jug can produce various liquids when commanded: water, acid, beer, honey, mayonnaise, oil, vinegar, or wine per day.
items.descriptionPlayer: A heavy ceramic jug with arcane symbols around the rim, always slightly damp on the outside

items.name: Periapt of Wound Closure
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this pendant, you stabilize at 0 hit points. When you roll Hit Dice to regain hit points, double the number restored.
items.descriptionPlayer: A delicate silver pendant set with a dark red stone that pulses faintly, like a heartbeat

items.name: Boots of Elvenkind
items.descriptionDM: While you wear these boots, your steps make no sound. You have advantage on Stealth checks that rely on moving silently.
items.descriptionPlayer: Soft leather boots of elven make, impossibly light and supple

items.name: Cloak of Elvenkind
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this cloak with hood up, Perception checks to see you have disadvantage, and you have advantage on Stealth checks to hide.
items.descriptionPlayer: A gray-green cloak that seems to shift color slightly depending on your surroundings

items.name: Eyes of Charming
items.descriptionDM: While wearing these crystal lenses, you can cast Charm Person (DC 13) on a humanoid within 30 feet. Three charges, regains at dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A pair of crystal lenses in a fine wire frame, with an oddly compelling sparkle

items.name: Gloves of Thievery
items.descriptionDM: These gloves are invisible while worn. While wearing them, you gain a +5 bonus to Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks and Dexterity checks to pick locks.
items.descriptionPlayer: Gloves so thin they're almost invisible. Your fingers feel more nimble wearing them.

items.name: Ring of Jumping
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this ring, you can cast the Jump spell from it as a bonus action at will.
items.descriptionPlayer: A thin band of springy metal that seems to bounce back when pressed

items.name: Ring of Swimming
items.descriptionDM: You have a swimming speed of 40 feet while wearing this ring.
items.descriptionPlayer: A blue-green ring carved from what appears to be coral

items.name: Ring of Warmth
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this ring, you have resistance to cold damage. You and everything you wear and carry are unharmed by temperatures as low as -50 degrees.
items.descriptionPlayer: A gold ring warm to the touch, with tiny flame-like engravings

items.name: Ring of Water Walking
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this ring, you can stand on and move across any liquid surface as if it were solid ground.
items.descriptionPlayer: A silvery ring with wave-like patterns that shimmer in the light

items.name: Amulet of Proof Against Detection
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this amulet, you are hidden from divination magic. You can't be targeted by such magic or perceived through magical scrying sensors.
items.descriptionPlayer: A dark metal amulet that seems to absorb light rather than reflect it

items.name: Boots of Striding and Springing
items.descriptionDM: While wearing these boots, your walking speed becomes 30 feet (unless already higher) and your jump distance is tripled.
items.descriptionPlayer: Sturdy but unusually light boots that make you feel springy on your feet

items.name: Bracers of Archery
items.descriptionDM: While wearing these bracers, you have proficiency with the longbow and shortbow, and you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls on ranged attacks made with such weapons.
items.descriptionPlayer: Leather bracers etched with arrow motifs that tighten comfortably around the forearms

items.name: Brooch of Shielding
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this brooch, you have resistance to force damage, and you are immune to the Magic Missile spell.
items.descriptionPlayer: A silver brooch shaped like a tiny shield, surprisingly heavy for its size

items.name: Circlet of Blasting
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this circlet, you can use an action to cast Scorching Ray with it. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A thin gold circlet set with a tiny red gem that occasionally flickers

items.name: Decanter of Endless Water
items.descriptionDM: This stoppered flask sloshes when shaken. You can use an action to remove the stopper and speak a command word, producing fresh or salt water in a stream, fountain, or geyser.
items.descriptionPlayer: A heavy stoppered flask that sloshes loudly despite feeling empty

items.name: Dust of Disappearance
items.descriptionDM: Found in a small packet, this powder renders you and everything you carry invisible for 2d4 minutes. One use.
items.descriptionPlayer: A small sealed packet of shimmering silver dust

items.name: Dust of Dryness
items.descriptionDM: This small packet contains 1d6+4 pinches of dust. You can use an action to sprinkle a pinch to absorb up to 15 cubic feet of water, forming a marble-sized pellet. Throwing the pellet restores the water.
items.descriptionPlayer: A tiny pouch of extraordinarily dry gray dust that seems to repel moisture

items.name: Eyes of Minute Seeing
items.descriptionDM: These crystal lenses fit over the eyes. While wearing them, you can see much better than normal out to 1 foot, gaining advantage on Investigation checks that rely on sight while searching within that range.
items.descriptionPlayer: Thick crystal lenses in a brass frame that make everything look enormous up close

items.name: Gem of Brightness
items.descriptionDM: This prism has 50 charges. You can use it to emit a hooded lantern's bright light, flare of blinding light, or a beam of dazzling light.
items.descriptionPlayer: A large, multifaceted crystal prism that catches light from impossible angles

items.name: Gloves of Missile Snaring
items.descriptionDM: When a ranged weapon attack hits you while you're wearing these gloves, you can use your reaction to reduce the damage by 1d10 + your Dexterity modifier. If you reduce the damage to 0, you catch the missile.
items.descriptionPlayer: Thick leather gloves with magically reinforced palms that seem to anticipate your grip

items.name: Hat of Wizardry
items.descriptionDM: This pointed hat is decorated with stars and moons. While wearing it, you gain a +1 bonus to spell save DC and can try to cast a wizard cantrip you don't know (DC 10 Arcana check). On a failed check, the cantrip fails.
items.descriptionPlayer: A tall pointed hat adorned with silver stars and crescent moons that shimmer faintly

items.name: Headband of Intellect
items.descriptionDM: Your Intelligence score is 19 while you wear this headband. No effect if your Intelligence is already 19 or higher.
items.descriptionPlayer: A plain silver headband that feels oddly heavy, as if weighted with knowledge

items.name: Lantern of Revealing
items.descriptionDM: While lit, this hooded lantern burns for 6 hours on 1 pint of oil. It sheds bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet. Invisible creatures and objects are visible within the bright light.
items.descriptionPlayer: A hooded lantern with unusually clear glass panels that cast a sharp, penetrating light

items.name: Medallion of Thoughts
items.descriptionDM: The medallion has 3 charges. While wearing it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast Detect Thoughts (DC 13). Regains 1d3 charges daily at dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A bronze medallion with an engraved eye that seems to follow your gaze

items.name: Necklace of Adaptation
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this necklace, you can breathe normally in any environment, and you have advantage on saving throws against harmful gases and vapors.
items.descriptionPlayer: A silver chain with a small pendant shaped like a pair of lungs

items.name: Rope of Climbing
items.descriptionDM: This 60-foot length of silk rope can be commanded to move on its own. As an action, you can command it to fasten, unfasten, knot, unknot, coil, or uncoil itself.
items.descriptionPlayer: A coil of fine silk rope that seems to shift and settle on its own

items.name: Sending Stones
items.descriptionDM: These paired stones allow two creatures holding them to cast Sending on each other once per dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A pair of smooth, river-worn stones that feel warm when held together

items.name: Slippers of Spider Climbing
items.descriptionDM: While wearing these light shoes, you can walk up, down, and across vertical surfaces and upside down along ceilings, while leaving your hands free. You have a climbing speed equal to your walking speed.
items.descriptionPlayer: Lightweight slippers with oddly sticky soles that grip surfaces in unusual ways

items.name: Stone of Good Luck
items.descriptionDM: While this polished agate is on your person, you gain a +1 bonus to ability checks and saving throws.
items.descriptionPlayer: A smooth, polished agate stone that feels pleasantly warm in your pocket

items.name: Wand of Magic Missiles
items.descriptionDM: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 or more charges to cast Magic Missile. For 1 charge, you cast the 1st-level version. You can increase by one level for each additional charge spent. Regains 1d6+1 charges at dawn. If you use the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles.
items.descriptionPlayer: A slender black wand tipped with a crystalline point that pulses with a faint white glow

items.name: Wand of Web
items.descriptionDM: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast Web (save DC 15). Regains 1d6+1 charges at dawn. If the last charge is spent, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles.
items.descriptionPlayer: A gnarled wand with what appear to be spider silk threads woven around the tip

items.name: Wind Fan
items.descriptionDM: While holding this fan, you can use an action to cast Gust of Wind (save DC 13). Once used, the fan shouldn't be used again until the next dawn. Each additional use before then has a cumulative 20% chance of the fan breaking.
items.descriptionPlayer: An ornate folding fan that feels heavier than it looks, with designs of wind and clouds

items.name: Bag of Tricks
items.descriptionDM: This ordinary bag contains 3d4 fuzzy objects. You can use an action to pull out a fuzzy object and throw it up to 20 feet. It transforms into a random creature that is friendly to you. Regains 1d4+3 objects at dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A small cloth bag that seems to move slightly on its own, as if something inside is wiggling

items.name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this cloak with its hood up in water, you can breathe underwater and have a swimming speed of 60 feet.
items.descriptionPlayer: A dark cloak with a strange, rubbery texture that shimmers like wet scales

items.name: Eversmoking Bottle
items.descriptionDM: When you open this bottle, a cloud of thick smoke pours out in a 60-foot radius. The cloud blocks vision. Speaking the command word closes the bottle; the cloud disperses after 10 minutes.
items.descriptionPlayer: A tightly sealed brass bottle that rattles as if pressurized, faintly warm

items.name: Quiver of Ehlonna
items.descriptionDM: This quiver has three compartments, each connected to an extradimensional space. It can hold up to 60 arrows, 18 javelins, and 6 objects like bows, quarterstaffs, or similar.
items.descriptionPlayer: A leather quiver that seems far roomier inside than its slim profile suggests

items.name: Wand of Magic Detection
items.descriptionDM: This wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Detect Magic. Regains 1d3 charges daily at dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A thin wand that hums slightly when pointed at certain objects

items.name: Wand of Secrets
items.descriptionDM: This wand has 3 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend 1 charge. If a secret door or trap is within 30 feet, the wand pulses and points toward the nearest one. Regains 1d3 charges daily at dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A short, unassuming wand that vibrates faintly in your hand

items.name: Potion of Superior Healing
items.descriptionDM: A creature that drinks this potion regains 8d4+8 hit points.
items.descriptionPlayer: A vial of deep ruby liquid that swirls on its own and feels warm in your hand

items.name: Potion of Clairvoyance
items.descriptionDM: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the Clairvoyance spell for 10 minutes.
items.descriptionPlayer: A potion of shifting pale blue liquid with tiny specks that look like distant stars

items.name: Potion of Diminution
items.descriptionDM: When you drink this potion, you gain the reduce effect of the Enlarge/Reduce spell for 1d4 hours (no concentration required).
items.descriptionPlayer: A tiny vial of liquid that seems to shrink slightly as you watch it

items.name: Potion of Gaseous Form
items.descriptionDM: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the Gaseous Form spell for 1 hour (no concentration required).
items.descriptionPlayer: A bottle of swirling gray mist trapped in liquid that seems to evaporate and reform

items.name: Potion of Invulnerability
items.descriptionDM: For 1 minute after drinking this potion, you have resistance to all damage.
items.descriptionPlayer: A thick, silvery liquid in a reinforced vial that feels indestructible

items.name: Flame Tongue Longsword
items.descriptionDM: You can use a bonus action to speak this sword's command word, causing flames to erupt from the blade. While ablaze, the sword deals an extra 2d6 fire damage and sheds bright light in 40 feet.
items.descriptionPlayer: An ornate longsword with faintly reddish steel and an unusually warm grip. The metal seems to shimmer like heated air.

items.name: Frost Brand Longsword
items.descriptionDM: When you hit with an attack using this magic sword, the target takes an extra 1d6 cold damage. While you hold the sword, you have resistance to fire damage. In freezing temperatures, it sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet.
items.descriptionPlayer: A longsword of pale blue steel that frosts over in warm air and chills the hand that holds it

items.name: +2 Longsword
items.descriptionDM: You have a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
items.descriptionPlayer: A masterwork longsword of exceptional quality, the blade hums faintly when drawn

items.name: +2 Shortsword
items.descriptionDM: You have a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
items.descriptionPlayer: A short blade of extraordinary quality that moves almost on its own

items.name: +2 Battleaxe
items.descriptionDM: You have a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
items.descriptionPlayer: A battleaxe with a double-edged head that gleams with an inner light

items.name: +2 Longbow
items.descriptionDM: You have a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
items.descriptionPlayer: A bow of dark wood that draws with impossible smoothness

items.name: Sun Blade
items.descriptionDM: This item appears to be a longsword hilt. While grasping the hilt, you can use a bonus action to create a blade of pure radiance or make it disappear. While the blade exists, it functions as a longsword that deals radiant damage instead of slashing and has a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls. It deals an extra 1d8 radiant damage to undead. The blade emits bright light in a 15-foot radius and dim light for an additional 15 feet. You can adjust the radius as a bonus action.
items.descriptionPlayer: A jeweled longsword hilt with no blade. It feels warm and vibrates faintly in your grip.

items.name: Vicious Longsword
items.descriptionDM: When you roll a 20 on your attack roll with this magic weapon, the target takes an extra 7 damage of the weapon's type.
items.descriptionPlayer: A longsword with serrated edges and a hilt wrapped in black leather. Something about it feels aggressive.

items.name: Mace of Disruption
items.descriptionDM: When you hit a fiend or undead with this magic weapon, it takes an extra 2d6 radiant damage. If the target has 25 hit points or fewer after taking this damage, it must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom save or be destroyed.
items.descriptionPlayer: A heavy mace carved from white stone that radiates a gentle warmth and faint golden light

items.name: Sword of Life Stealing
items.descriptionDM: When you attack a creature with this magic weapon and roll a 20 on the attack roll, the target takes an extra 10 necrotic damage if it isn't a construct or undead, and you gain 10 temporary hit points.
items.descriptionPlayer: A black-bladed longsword that seems to drink in surrounding light. Holding it makes you feel oddly invigorated.

items.name: Sword of Wounding
items.descriptionDM: Hit points lost to this weapon's damage can be regained only through a short or long rest. Once per turn when you hit a creature, you can wound the target. A wounded creature takes 1d4 necrotic damage at the start of each of its turns for each time you've wounded it.
items.descriptionPlayer: A cruel-looking blade with channels cut along the flat. The edge seems to split the air before it touches anything.

items.name: Dagger of Venom
items.descriptionDM: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. You can use an action to coat the blade with thick, black poison that lasts for 1 minute or until an attack hits. A creature hit by the poisoned weapon must succeed on a DC 15 Con save or take 2d10 poison damage and become poisoned for 1 minute. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A dagger with a dark, oily blade and a hollowed hilt. Something viscous glistens near the guard.

items.name: +2 Shield
items.descriptionDM: While holding this shield, you have a +2 bonus to AC in addition to the shield's normal AC bonus.
items.descriptionPlayer: An imposing shield that seems to deflect light oddly, as if the air around it bends slightly

items.name: +1 Plate Armor
items.descriptionDM: You have a +1 bonus to AC while wearing this armor.
items.descriptionPlayer: A suit of full plate armor polished to a mirror shine with faintly glowing joints

items.name: +2 Leather Armor
items.descriptionDM: You have a +2 bonus to AC while wearing this armor.
items.descriptionPlayer: Leather armor that fits like a second skin and seems to harden at the point of impact

items.name: Adamantine Plate Armor
items.descriptionDM: This suit of armor is reinforced with adamantine. While wearing it, any critical hit against you becomes a normal hit.
items.descriptionPlayer: Full plate armor of dull, dark metal. It looks ancient but shows no sign of wear or damage.

items.name: Shield of Missile Attraction
items.descriptionDM: While holding this shield, you have resistance to damage from ranged weapon attacks. Curse: After attuning, ranged attacks against other targets within 10 feet are redirected to you.
items.descriptionPlayer: A shield with a bullseye painted on its face. Probably just decorative.

items.name: Glamoured Studded Leather
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC. You can also use a bonus action to make the armor appear as normal clothing or another kind of armor. The illusion extends to the weight of the armor.
items.descriptionPlayer: Studded leather that shimmers faintly, the studs seeming to rearrange themselves when you blink

items.name: Ring of Protection
items.descriptionDM: You gain a +1 bonus to AC and saving throws while wearing this ring.
items.descriptionPlayer: A thin band of silver-white metal, almost weightless, with a faintly etched pattern you can't quite make out

items.name: Amulet of Health
items.descriptionDM: Your Constitution score is 19 while you wear this amulet. No effect if your Constitution is already 19 or higher.
items.descriptionPlayer: A heavy gold amulet set with a deep green stone. It feels warm against the chest.

items.name: Belt of Hill Giant Strength
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this belt, your Strength score is set to 21. No effect if your Strength is already 21 or higher.
items.descriptionPlayer: A thick leather belt with an oversized iron buckle carved with crude, powerful-looking runes

items.name: Cloak of Displacement
items.descriptionDM: While you wear this cloak, it projects an illusion that makes you appear to be standing near your actual location. Attack rolls against you have disadvantage. Ceases until start of your next turn if you take damage.
items.descriptionPlayer: A dark cloak that makes your eyes water slightly if you stare at it too long — its edges seem blurred

items.name: Ring of Spell Storing
items.descriptionDM: This ring stores spells cast into it, holding them until the attuned wearer uses them. The ring can store up to 5 levels worth of spells at a time.
items.descriptionPlayer: A ring carved from a single piece of dark crystal, with what appear to be tiny flecks of light moving inside

items.name: Figurine of Wondrous Power (Silver Raven)
items.descriptionDM: This silver statuette of a raven can become a real raven for up to 12 hours. You can cast Animal Messenger on it at will. Can be used again after 2 days.
items.descriptionPlayer: A beautifully detailed silver raven figurine, its eyes are tiny garnets that seem to follow you

items.name: Cape of the Mountebank
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this cape, you can cast Dimension Door as an action. This property can't be used again until the next dawn. When you disappear, you leave behind a cloud of smoke.
items.descriptionPlayer: A theatrical crimson cape with a faint smell of sulfur and stage smoke woven into its fabric

items.name: Helm of Teleportation
items.descriptionDM: This helm has 3 charges. While wearing it, you can cast Teleport by expending 1 charge. The helm regains 1d3 charges daily at dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: An ornate metal helm with arcane circuitry traced in silver across its surface

items.name: Portable Hole
items.descriptionDM: This fine black cloth creates a 6-foot-wide, 10-foot-deep extradimensional hole when unfolded and placed on a surface. Placing it inside a bag of holding creates a rift to the Astral Plane.
items.descriptionPlayer: A piece of silk-like black cloth that seems impossibly dark, as if looking into nothing at all

items.name: Necklace of Fireballs
items.descriptionDM: This necklace has 1d6+3 beads. You can detach a bead and throw it up to 60 feet, detonating as a 3rd-level Fireball (DC 15).
items.descriptionPlayer: A delicate chain strung with several small red-orange beads that are uncomfortably warm

items.name: Cloak of the Bat
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this cloak, you have advantage on Stealth checks. In dim light or darkness, you can use your cloak to fly at 40 feet. If you fly in bright light, you fall. You can also polymorph into a bat.
items.descriptionPlayer: A cloak of dark, leathery material that unfurls wider than expected, like wings

items.name: Ring of Evasion
items.descriptionDM: This ring has 3 charges. When you fail a Dexterity saving throw, you can use your reaction to expend 1 charge to succeed instead. Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A platinum ring set with a tiny cat's eye gem that seems to dart and shift

items.name: Ring of Resistance
items.descriptionDM: You have resistance to one damage type while wearing this ring. The type is determined by the gem in the ring.
items.descriptionPlayer: A silver ring set with a single gemstone that pulses with inner energy

items.name: Staff of Healing
items.descriptionDM: This staff has 10 charges. While holding it, you can use an action to expend charges to cast Cure Wounds, Lesser Restoration, or Mass Cure Wounds. Regains 1d6+4 charges at dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A white wooden staff topped with a softly glowing crystal. It feels warm and comforting to hold.

items.name: Staff of the Woodlands
items.descriptionDM: This staff has 6 charges and can be used to cast various nature spells. It also functions as a +2 quarterstaff. Regains 1d6 charges at dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A living staff of twisted oak, still sprouting tiny green leaves despite being cut long ago

items.name: Wand of Fireballs
items.descriptionDM: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 or more charges to cast Fireball (save DC 15). Regains 1d6+1 charges at dawn. If the last charge is spent, roll d20: on a 1, the wand crumbles to ashes.
items.descriptionPlayer: A charred red wand that is always warm to the touch. The tip occasionally sparks.

items.name: Wand of Lightning Bolts
items.descriptionDM: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can expend 1 or more charges to cast Lightning Bolt (save DC 15). Regains 1d6+1 charges at dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A wand of pale blue crystal that crackles with tiny arcs of static electricity

items.name: Mantle of Spell Resistance
items.descriptionDM: You have advantage on saving throws against spells while wearing this cloak.
items.descriptionPlayer: A heavy cloak of deep indigo that seems to ripple and resist when magic is cast nearby

items.name: Ring of Free Action
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this ring, difficult terrain doesn't cost you extra movement. Magic can neither reduce your speed nor cause you to be paralyzed or restrained.
items.descriptionPlayer: A smooth platinum band that seems to slide effortlessly on and off the finger

items.name: Boots of Speed
items.descriptionDM: While wearing these boots, you can use a bonus action to click the heels together. Your walking speed doubles for 10 minutes. You can use this property again after finishing a long rest.
items.descriptionPlayer: Red leather boots with a winged design and small heel plates that click together easily

items.name: Ioun Stone (Protection)
items.descriptionDM: A dusty rose prism that orbits your head. You gain a +1 bonus to AC while it orbits.
items.descriptionPlayer: A dusty rose crystal prism that floats gently when released and seems drawn to your presence

items.name: Potion of Supreme Healing
items.descriptionDM: A creature that drinks this potion regains 10d4+20 hit points.
items.descriptionPlayer: A large vial of brilliant scarlet liquid that glows from within, warm even through thick glass

items.name: Potion of Flying
items.descriptionDM: When you drink this potion, you gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed for 1 hour.
items.descriptionPlayer: A clear potion with tiny white clouds swirling inside it

items.name: Potion of Invisibility
items.descriptionDM: When you drink this potion, you become invisible for 1 hour. Anything you wear or carry is invisible with you. The effect ends early if you attack or cast a spell.
items.descriptionPlayer: A bottle of liquid so clear it's almost invisible itself — the glass appears empty

items.name: Potion of Speed
items.descriptionDM: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the Haste spell for 1 minute (no concentration required). The yellow fluid streaks through the potion's container.
items.descriptionPlayer: A golden potion with streaks of liquid racing around inside the vial at blinding speed

items.name: Staff of Power
items.descriptionDM: This staff has 20 charges. While holding it, you gain a +2 bonus to AC, saving throws, and spell attack rolls. Can cast various spells. 5% chance of retributive strike if last charge is used.
items.descriptionPlayer: A tall staff of dark, polished wood with silver bands. The air around it feels charged, like the moment before lightning strikes.

items.name: +3 Longsword
items.descriptionDM: You have a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.
items.descriptionPlayer: A blade of extraordinary craftsmanship, its edge impossibly sharp, the metal seemingly alive with purpose

items.name: +3 Shield
items.descriptionDM: While holding this shield, you have a +3 bonus to AC in addition to the shield's normal AC bonus.
items.descriptionPlayer: A radiant shield that seems to push the air around it, as if maintaining a constant invisible barrier

items.name: Animated Shield
items.descriptionDM: As a bonus action, you can cause this shield to animate. It hovers in your space to protect you, leaving your hands free. Remains animated for 1 minute.
items.descriptionPlayer: A well-balanced shield that occasionally vibrates slightly, as if impatient to move

items.name: Belt of Fire Giant Strength
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this belt, your Strength score is set to 25.
items.descriptionPlayer: A belt of scorched red leather and black iron, the buckle forged in the shape of a burning fist

items.name: Crystal Ball
items.descriptionDM: While touching it, you can cast Scrying (save DC 17).
items.descriptionPlayer: A flawless crystal sphere that clouds and clears seemingly at random, occasionally showing faint shapes

items.name: Dancing Sword
items.descriptionDM: You can use a bonus action to toss this sword into the air and speak the command word. It hovers and attacks creatures on its own for 4 rounds, then returns.
items.descriptionPlayer: A longsword with an almost weightless feel, as if gravity barely applies to it

items.name: Rod of Alertness
items.descriptionDM: This rod has 6 charges. While holding it, you have advantage on Perception checks and initiative rolls. Can also cast Alarm, Detect Evil and Good, Detect Magic, and other spells.
items.descriptionPlayer: An iron rod topped with a sculpted eye that seems a bit too lifelike for comfort

items.name: Robe of Stars
items.descriptionDM: This robe gives +1 to saving throws. Six star embroideries can be pulled off and used to cast Magic Missile at 5th level. Stars regrow at dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: A dark robe with embroidered stars that occasionally seem to twinkle, as if reflecting an unseen sky

items.name: Tome of Understanding
items.descriptionDM: Studying this book for 48 hours increases your Wisdom score by 2 (and your maximum). The book then loses its magic for a century.
items.descriptionPlayer: A thick leather-bound tome that feels heavy with purpose. The pages seem to shift when not being read directly.

items.name: Manual of Bodily Health
items.descriptionDM: Studying this book for 48 hours increases your Constitution score by 2 (and your maximum). Loses its magic for a century.
items.descriptionPlayer: A surprisingly sturdy book bound in what looks like dragonhide. Simply holding it makes you feel healthier.

items.name: Manual of Gainful Exercise
items.descriptionDM: Studying this book for 48 hours increases your Strength score by 2 (and your maximum). Loses its magic for a century.
items.descriptionPlayer: A worn training manual illustrated with powerful figures. Your muscles ache pleasantly after touching it.

items.name: Tome of Clear Thought
items.descriptionDM: Studying this book for 48 hours increases your Intelligence score by 2 (and your maximum). Loses its magic for a century.
items.descriptionPlayer: A pristine tome with pages of unusual clarity. Reading even a sentence makes your thoughts feel sharper.

items.name: Tome of Leadership and Influence
items.descriptionDM: Studying this book for 48 hours increases your Charisma score by 2 (and your maximum). Loses its magic for a century.
items.descriptionPlayer: An elegant book bound in red leather with gold lettering. It practically demands to be read aloud.

items.name: Carpet of Flying
items.descriptionDM: You can speak the carpet's command word to make it hover and fly. Different sizes have different speeds and carrying capacities.
items.descriptionPlayer: A large ornate rug with strange flowing patterns that seem to shift like wind currents

items.name: Mirror of Life Trapping
items.descriptionDM: This mirror has 12 extradimensional cells. When a creature that isn't you sees its reflection within 30 feet, it must succeed on a DC 15 Charisma save or be trapped inside one of the cells.
items.descriptionPlayer: A full-length mirror in an ornate frame. Your reflection seems delayed by a fraction of a second.

items.name: Ring of Regeneration
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this ring, you regain 1d6 hit points every 10 minutes, provided you have at least 1 hit point. If you lose a body part, the ring causes the missing part to regrow in 1d6+1 days.
items.descriptionPlayer: A ring of living wood that seems to grow and repair itself before your eyes

items.name: Ring of Telekinesis
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this ring, you can cast the Telekinesis spell at will, but you can target only objects that aren't being worn or carried.
items.descriptionPlayer: A ring with a gem that flickers between colors. Small objects near it seem to shift slightly.

items.name: Deck of Many Things
items.descriptionDM: This deck contains cards of ivory or vellum. Before drawing, declare how many cards you intend to draw. Each card drawn has a powerful magical effect, from gaining wishes to being imprisoned on another plane.
items.descriptionPlayer: A worn velvet pouch containing a set of oversized cards. They feel oddly slippery and never stack quite right. The shopkeeper handles them very, very carefully.

items.name: Holy Avenger
items.descriptionDM: You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls. Fiends and undead take an extra 2d10 radiant damage. Creates a 10-foot aura giving allies advantage on saves against spells.
items.descriptionPlayer: A greatsword of blinding silver that radiates palpable warmth. Its crossguard is shaped like outstretched wings.

items.name: Luck Blade
items.descriptionDM: You gain +1 to attack, damage rolls, and saving throws. The sword has 1d4-1 charges (minimum 0). Each charge can be used to cast Wish.
items.descriptionPlayer: A short sword that feels impossibly right in your hand, as if it was always meant to be there. Somehow lucky just to hold.

items.name: Ring of Three Wishes
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this ring, you can expend 1 of its 3 charges to cast the Wish spell. Becomes nonmagical when the last charge is used.
items.descriptionPlayer: A plain gold ring with three tiny sapphires. Two seem dull, but one still catches the light brilliantly.

items.name: Vorpal Sword
items.descriptionDM: You gain a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls. On a natural 20, you cut off one of the creature's heads. If the creature can't survive without the head, it dies.
items.descriptionPlayer: A greatsword so sharp the air itself seems to part around the blade. Looking at the edge too closely makes your eyes hurt.

items.name: Robe of the Archmagi
items.descriptionDM: This elegant garment provides AC 15 + Dex mod. You have advantage on saving throws against spells. Your spell save DC and spell attack bonus each increase by 2.
items.descriptionPlayer: A robe of unearthly beauty that seems to be woven from liquid starlight. It changes color subtly as it moves.

items.name: Scarab of Protection
items.descriptionDM: This brooch has 12 charges. Turns failed saves against necromancy/undead into successes. Also grants advantage on saves against spells.
items.descriptionPlayer: A gold brooch shaped like a scarab beetle, inlaid with lapis lazuli. It feels ancient and protective.

items.name: Staff of the Magi
items.descriptionDM: This staff has 50 charges. Grants +2 to spell attack rolls. Can cast various powerful spells. Regains 4d6+2 charges daily at dawn. 5% retributive strike chance on last charge.
items.descriptionPlayer: A tall staff of ancient wood bound in arcane metals. Reality itself seems to bend slightly around it. Even non-magic users feel its power.

items.name: Armor of Invulnerability
items.descriptionDM: You have resistance to nonmagical damage. You can use an action to become immune to nonmagical damage for 10 minutes. Once used, this action can't be used again until the next dawn.
items.descriptionPlayer: Full plate armor that gleams with an inner light. Despite its bulk, it feels no heavier than leather.

items.name: Rod of Lordly Might
items.descriptionDM: This rod functions as a magic mace that grants +3 to attack and damage rolls. It has buttons that transform it into a flame tongue, a +3 battleaxe, a +3 spear, or other useful tools. It has various other properties including draining life and causing paralysis.
items.descriptionPlayer: A heavy metal rod with six buttons along its shaft. It feels far more important than it looks.

items.name: Sphere of Annihilation
items.descriptionDM: This 2-foot-diameter black sphere obliterates all matter it passes through. You can mentally control it within 60 feet with a DC 25 Arcana check.
items.descriptionPlayer: A perfectly round void of absolute darkness, about two feet across. Not a sphere of any material — a sphere of nothing.

items.name: Iron Flask
items.descriptionDM: This iron bottle can trap a creature from another plane. As an action, you can open it and force a creature within 60 feet to make a DC 17 Wisdom save or be trapped inside.
items.descriptionPlayer: A sealed iron bottle etched with planar symbols, heavier than it should be. Something seems to press against the inside.

items.name: Cloak of Invisibility
items.descriptionDM: While wearing this cloak, you can pull its hood over your head to become invisible. Anything you carry or wear is invisible too. You remain invisible until you remove the hood, for a total of 2 hours per day.
items.descriptionPlayer: A cloak of material so fine it's almost translucent. The edges seem to dissolve into the air.
